changeSet.author: ArturChegur
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_chat_stats AS SELECT c.id AS chat_ref, c.telegram_chat_id, c.chat_title, c.chat_username, c.chat_type, COUNT(m.id)::BIGINT AS total_messages, COUNT(m.id) FILTER ( WHERE m.message_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::BIGINT AS messages_last_24_hours, COUNT(m.id) FILTER ( WHERE m.message_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')::BIGINT AS messages_last_1_hour, COUNT(DISTINCT m.user_ref)::BIGINT AS participants_count FROM telegram_chat c LEFT JOIN telegram_message m ON m.chat_ref = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.telegram_chat_id, c.chat_title, c.chat_username, c.chat_type;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_chat_user_stats AS SELECT c.id AS chat_ref, c.telegram_chat_id, u.id AS user_ref, u.telegram_user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.username, ''), NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', u.first_name, u.last_name)), ''), CONCAT('User #', u.telegram_user_id::TEXT)) AS display_name, COUNT(m.id)::BIGINT AS total_messages, COUNT(m.id) FILTER ( WHERE m.message_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::BIGINT AS messages_last_24_hours, COUNT(m.id) FILTER ( WHERE m.message_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')::BIGINT AS messages_last_1_hour FROM telegram_chat c JOIN telegram_message m ON m.chat_ref = c.id AND m.user_ref IS NOT NULL JOIN telegram_user u ON u.id = m.user_ref GROUP BY c.id, c.telegram_chat_id, u.id, u.telegram_user_id, u.username, u.first_name, u.last_name;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_chat_user_hourly_messages AS SELECT m.chat_ref, c.telegram_chat_id, u.telegram_user_id, DATE_TRUNC('hour', m.message_date) AS hour_start, COUNT(m.id)::BIGINT AS messages_count FROM telegram_message m JOIN telegram_chat c ON c.id = m.chat_ref JOIN telegram_user u ON u.id = m.user_ref WHERE m.user_ref IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.chat_ref, c.telegram_chat_id, u.telegram_user_id, DATE_TRUNC('hour', m.message_date);
